title: Kids 500ml BPA Free Tritan Water Bottle - Leakproof & Shatterproof, Perfect for School, Work, Travel & Camping
features: LEAK PROOF LID - With an extra safety catch, carry safely in your bag, with no leaks, even when upside down!

EXTRA STRONG & WILL NOT SHATTER - Our reusable pink girls water bottle is made from tough, safe non-toxic BPA-FREE plastic (extra thick 1.5mm) and is strong enough for all sports and outdoor activities

HYGIENIC AND EASY TO CLEAN - Dishwasher proof lid with no fiddly spouts or straws where mould and bacteria can hide. NO NASTY CHEMICALS - Our kids water bottle is BPA FREE & TRITAN plastic so you know your kids are safe making it the perfect gifts for girls.
CLEAR AND REFRESHING TASTE - Perfect water bottle for school. Lightweight, leakproof with a clear pure taste and easy flow spout that encourages all day drinking

LONG LASTING QUALITY - Our Customers agree! Our 100% SATISFACTION, MONEY BACK guarantee means we are here to help if you have any issues in the first 6 months and a SPARE stopper is included, so give a long lasting unique unicorn present that she will love!
description: Product Description Quality Assured We use premium quality materials only All our bottles are manually inspected before packing Our great value for money package includes 1 x Gift Box 1 x Water Bottle with Dishwasher proof lid 1 x spare silicone bung 1 x Fruit Filter 1 x Soft Sponge Brush Key Features: Leak proof lid Shatter proof body Durable print Suitable for hot and cold drinks from -10 ° C to 95 ° C, you can use this bottle all year round The Practical Stuff: Younger children should be shown how to tilt the bottle carefully to control flow rate Before first use, and after every use, wash bottle and lid in hot soapy water using the complimentary brush provided The bottle lid is dishwasher proof, please wash bottle by hand to keep the print looking beautiful Do not freeze Do not use in the microwave Superior design and quality EXTRA LAYER OVER PRINT Unlike cheaper bottles, the beautiful print will last a long time if treated with care. Why? We add an extra layer of protection over the print to make it more durable and long lasting. SHATTER PROOF 1.5 MM THICK BODY We use 1.5 mm thick plastic for the body so it won't shatter or break if accidentally dropped! And we do a drop-test on every batch! LEAKPROOF LID A hypoallergenic silicon bung seals the spout and vent completely when the cover is closed. A safety catch on the lid ensures the lid can't accidentally pop open in your bag. And of course we do a leak-test on every batch! STRONG NYLON CARRY STRAP A strong nylon strap is attached securely to the bottle, or you can add a carabiner clip (not included) to attach it to the outside of your rucksack or school bag! Safe for you and your family 100% BPA Free Tritan Plastic body and food-grade safe PP lid BETTER FOR TEETH AND JAW DEVELOPMENT In youngsters, sucking on spouts can result in the upper jaw failing to grow properly which may cause crowding of the teeth, and could result in a need for braces or orthodontic treatments later on (Oral Health Foundation) Our bottle encourages proper drinking from an early age HYGIENIC DESIGN Dishwasher proof lid with no fiddly spouts or straws where bacteria can accumulate Our 500 ml bottle is strong, but slim and lightweight It's a great size for Handbags Not too heavy for school bags! Fits standard UK cup holders perfectly! PROTECT THE ENVIRONMENT Reduce plastic waster with our premium quality reusable bottle that provides a clear and refreshing taste every time! MULTI-FUNCTIONAL WITH BONUS ACCESSORIES FRUIT FILTER Use the fruit filter to create delicious and healthy flavoured water EASILY ADD ICE The wide mouth on the bottle makes it easy to add ice cubes USE FOR HOT DRINKS You can safely use this bottle all year around and it's perfect for fruit tea! WASHING BRUSH AND GIFT BOX A washing brush is included to wash the bottle. A gift box makes this a great present that is so easy to wrap beautifully
